mapper.select: select * from farming_cycle where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into farming_cycle (user_id, business_type, item_id, item_name, cycle_name, scale_value, scale_unit, start_date, expected_end_date, actual_end_date, status, is_public, description) values (#{userId}, #{businessType}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{cycleName}, #{scaleValue}, #{scaleUnit}, #{startDate}, #{expectedEndDate}, #{actualEndDate}, #{status}, #{isPublic}, #{description})
mapper.update: update farming_cycle set item_id = #{itemId}, item_name = #{itemName}, cycle_name = #{cycleName}, scale_value = #{scaleValue}, scale_unit = #{scaleUnit}, start_date = #{startDate}, expected_end_date = #{expectedEndDate}, actual_end_date = #{actualEndDate}, status = #{status}, is_public = #{isPublic}, description = #{description} where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from farming_cycle where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select fr.*, st.template_name, fc.cycle_name from farming_record fr left join farming_cycle fc on fr.cycle_id = fc.id left join stage_template st on fr.template_id = st.id where fc.user_id = #{userId} and fc.business_type = #{businessType} order by fr.id desc

select fr.*, st.template_name, fc.cycle_name from farming_record fr left join farming_cycle fc on fr.cycle_id = fc.id left join stage_template st on fr.template_id = st.id where fr.id = #{id} and fc.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into farming_record (cycle_id, template_id, record_title, record_content, record_time, image_url) values (#{cycleId}, #{templateId}, #{recordTitle}, #{recordContent}, #{recordTime}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.update: update farming_record set cycle_id = #{cycleId}, template_id = #{templateId}, record_title = #{recordTitle}, record_content = #{recordContent}, record_time = #{recordTime}, image_url = #{imageUrl} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select p.*, c.category_name from product_info p left join product_category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.seller_id = #{sellerId} and p.seller_type = #{sellerType} order by p.id desc
select p.*, c.category_name from product_info p left join product_category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.id = #{id} and p.seller_id = #{sellerId}
mapper.insert: insert into product_info (product_name, category_id, seller_id, seller_type, source_cycle_id, price, stock, unit, main_image, description, sales_count, status) values (#{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{sellerId}, #{sellerType}, #{sourceCycleId}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{unit}, #{mainImage}, #{description}, #{salesCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: update product_info set product_name = #{productName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, source_cycle_id = #{sourceCycleId}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, unit = #{unit}, main_image = #{mainImage}, description = #{description}, sales_count = #{salesCount}, status = #{status} where id = #{id} and seller_id = #{sellerId}
mapper.delete: delete from product_info where id = #{id} and seller_id = #{sellerId}
mapper.select: select oi.*, buyer.real_name as user_name from order_info oi left join sys_user buyer on oi.user_id = buyer.id where oi.seller_id = #{sellerId} order by oi.id desc
select * from stage_template where business_type = #{businessType} and status = 'ENABLED' order by id asc
